message: Multiple canonical concepts match this query. Choose one to continue.

candidates.title: Order
candidates.shortDefinition: Order is an arranged condition in which elements are placed, related, or sequenced in a stable way.

candidates.title: Social Order
candidates.shortDefinition: Social order is the patterned stability of roles, expectations, and relations inside a society.

candidates.title: Public Order
candidates.shortDefinition: Public order is the maintained condition of civic stability, safety, and enforceable peace in public life.

interpretation.message: This query matches multiple authored concepts and requires an explicit choice.
